stocks.impact_theory: Apple's Q2 FY2026 earnings beat expectations with $111.2B revenue (+17% YoY) and $2.01 EPS (+22% YoY), driven by iPhone and Services strength. Economic implications: Signals robust consumer demand amid inflation concerns. Market psychology: Eases fears of China slowdown and AI lag. Historical parallels: 2024 Q1 beat led to 10% rally. Analogies: Like a phoenix rising from supply chain ashes; a dam breaking to flood bullish sentiment.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Strong earnings beat and upbeat Q3 guidance per web searches; X posts show trader buys and positive momentum; premarket +3.8% confirms sentiment shift.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long positions targeting $290 (4% gain) on continued rally; options like May 8 290C profitable.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if drops below $275 support (-2% potential loss realization).
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Supply shortages in memory chips, escalating Middle East tensions disrupting chains, overbought tech sector pullback.

stocks.justification: Unambiguous earnings beat, immediate positive stock reaction, high X engagement.

stocks.impact_theory: Reddit Q1 2026 revenue $663M (+69% YoY), DAUq 126.8M (+17%). Economic: Validates AI/data licensing boom. Psychology: Proves post-IPO growth sustainability. Historical: Similar to SNAP 2018 surge. Analogies: Rocket fuel from user growth; snowball effect in social media virality.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Massive revenue beat, X hype for new ATHs; web confirms 12-16% premarket surge.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: User monetization challenges, competition from TikTok/X, high valuation vulnerability.

stocks.justification: Exceptional growth metrics, strong market reaction.

stocks.impact_theory: Q1 DAU miss, lowered FY bookings guidance due to kid safety features. Economic: Highlights metaverse/gaming slowdown. Psychology: Erodes growth narrative. Historical: Unity 2023 post-revenue miss drop. Analogies: Car braking hard before crash; balloon deflating after hype.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Missed estimates and guidance cut; web/X note 24% drop.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Avoid; long only on rebound above $42.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Oversold bounce, positive user engagement surprise.

stocks.justification: Clear miss but gaming sector volatile.

stocks.impact_theory: Q1 earnings $4.2B (down YoY but beat), revenue $85.14B beat; impacted by Iran war shipping. Economic: Oil rally offsets. Psychology: Resilient amid geopolitics. Historical: 2022 war boosts. Analogies: Ship steady in storm; phoenix from oil fire.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Beat estimates despite headwinds; X mentions flat but positive.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long to $130 (6% gain) on oil prices.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Iran Strait closure escalation, demand drop.

stocks.justification: Beat but YoY decline tempers enthusiasm.

stocks.impact_theory: Q1 adjusted EPS $1.41 beat, net $2.2B down YoY; upstream strength from oil surge. Economic: Geopolitical premium. Psychology: Confidence in dividends. Historical: Similar to 2022. Analogies: Anchor holding in turbulence; oil well gushing despite pressure.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: EPS beat on high oil; web confirms positive analyst views.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Prolonged war disrupting supply more than demand.
